title: bridelia mollis
intro: Bridelia mollis, also known as the Soft Bridelia or Soft Bridal Wreath, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. Bridelia mollis is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and treating digestive issues. Bridelia mollis is often used to prepare herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be taken internally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
